title: Thai Comte Galette
description: A Thai twist on the classic galette pastry. Flaky, indulgent, and packed with the rich flavors of Thailand.
instructions: Roll out the pastry dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch
Transfer the dough to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper
Mix the comte cheese, sesame seeds, grated ginger, and Thai red chili flakes in a bowl
Spread the cheese mixture evenly over the center of the dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges
Fold the edges of the dough over the filling, pressing gently to seal
Brush the top of the galette with the beaten egg and sprinkle with chopped cilantro
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted
Drizzle the balsamic glaze and honey over the galette
Sprinkle with chopped Thai basil and serve warm
